title: Pegasus WMS
description: Settings for the JupyterLab Pegasus extension.

provider.title: LLM provider
provider.description: LLM provider to use. Config is also read from ~/.pegasus-ai/.env.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model name. Leave blank to use the provider default.

apiKey.title: API key
apiKey.description: API key for the selected provider.

knowledgePath.title: Knowledge store path
knowledgePath.description: Path to the Pegasus knowledge store. Defaults to /opt/pegasus-ai/knowledge/ if it exists.
